action.description: May logistics ship under a license exception?

context.action_boundary: May logistics ship under a license exception?
context.anomaly_observed: A license exception memo exists, but exception use depends on destination, consignee role, and item-control status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SOR-047 exports controlled analyzer part C-17 to Canada for consignee role service depot on 2026-06-23.
License exception EXC-SOR-047 covers controlled analyzer part C-17, destination Canada, consignee role internal repair center, shipment date 2026-06-23.
General note says Canada shipments may still need exact exception evidence when item control status is controlled.

policy_documents.content: License-exception shipping is complete only when exception evidence matches item control status, destination, consignee role, and shipment date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
